    Come enjoy the beautiful weather on World Gin Day paired with some of our patio pounders such as our Wicklow 75 made with @glendaloughdistillery Rose Irish Gin, lavender, butterfly pea, and sparkling wine or The Real Capital made with @wildeirishgin infused with cucumber and strawberry, and lime. @thewharfdc and @absolutvodka are hosting Pride on the Pier today so there’s good times and craic for all!
